name: KashCal
desc: All your calendars in one Android app. Sync iCloud, Nextcloud, Fastmail, and more CalDAV servers, plus your device's Google and Outlook calendars. Private by d…
descFull: All your calendars in one Android app. Sync iCloud, Nextcloud, Fastmail, and more CalDAV servers, plus your device's Google and Outlook calendars. Private by default: no ads, no trackers, no account.
